case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. WILLIAM E WALZ

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WALZ, WILLIAM E JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALZ, WILLIAM E $1,286.57 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,511.57, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE-JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK SERVED FEB-07-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WALZ, WILLIAM E
